name: DeepSeek-V2.5
archDisplay: MoE transformer, 236B total / 21B active — merge of DeepSeek-V2-Chat-0628 and DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Instruct-0724
note: Merged V2-Chat and Coder-V2 into a single 236B model, improving general writing/instruction-following while retaining coding strength.
tpsNote: 236B total params exceed a single RTX 4090's 24GB even at 4-bit; requires multi-GPU or CPU/RAM offload

results.notes: AlpacaEval 2.0 score from the official HF model card's benchmark comparison table (DeepSeek-V2-0628 / DeepSeek-Coder-V2-0724 / DeepSeek-V2.5 columns).
MT-Bench score from the same official HF model card table.
'Aider' row from the same official HF model card table (real-world multi-language code-editing benchmark used by the Aider tool).
'SWE-verified' row from the same official HF model card table, i.e. SWE-bench Verified.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real via official DeepSeek api-docs announcement (release date literally states '2024/09/05') and HF model card: 236B/21B active, merge of V2-Chat-0628 + Coder-V2-Instruct-0724. Context length 128K corroborated via OpenRouter listing. HumanEval 89, MMLU-Pro 65.83, LiveCodeBench 41.8, ArenaHard 76.2 all match figures found. No changes needed.
